title: May 7, 2026
sentiment: We patch the cracks and call it progress, then wake to build again.

stories.title: Cloudflare to cut about 20% workforce
stories.summary: Over a thousand people, let go in a single morning. The infrastructure that held others up couldn't hold itself.

stories.title: Dirtyfrag: Universal Linux LPE
stories.summary: A privilege escalation that lives in the space between fixes — the cracks nobody meant to leave.

stories.title: Agents need control flow, not more prompts
stories.summary: More prompts stack on top of broken architecture like sand on glass. The work is in the structure.
